phrases.english: Believe in yourself, you can do it.
You're a true friend, always there.
I miss our talks, a lot.
Good things, come to those who wait.
phrases.indonesian: Hal baik, datang pada yang sabar.
phrases.transliteration: Hal baiik, daatang pada yang sabar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.

phrases.indonesian: Pikir di luar, bangun di dalam.
phrases.transliteration: Pi-kir di lu-ar, ba-ngun di da-lam.

phrases.english: Past is past, let it go.
Learn a little, grow a lot.
Embrace the challenge, you will win.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.
phrases.transliteration: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.

phrases.english: I want to buy this one.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih sedikit.
phrases.transliteration: Deh-ngar leh-bikh bah-nyak, bee-chah-rah leh-bikh se-dee-kit.

phrases.indonesian: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.
phrases.transliteration: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.

phrases.english: Discover new cultures, connect with people.
phrases.indonesian: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.
phrases.transliteration: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.

phrases.english: Understand the language, feel the spirit.
Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Find your center, be present now.
Let go of worries, embrace peace.
I want to go, to the beach.
You are stronger than you think.
A little hope, goes a long way.
Embrace the challenge, find your strength.
A little more, and we're there.

phrases.indonesian: Waktu yang baik, dengan orang baik.
phrases.transliteration: Wakh-too yahng bah-eek, deh-nghan oh-rahng bah-eek.

phrases.english: The path is long, but you are strong.
phrases.swahili: Njia ni ndefu, lakini wewe ni hodari.
phrases.transliteration: NJI-a ni NDE-fu, la-KI-ni WE-we ni ho-DA-ri

phrases.english: Focus your mind, embrace the challenge.
The sun shines brightly, doesn't it?
Face the unknown, with a smile.

phrases.swahili: Inuka juu, juu ya shaka yoyote.
phrases.transliteration: Inuka juu, juu ya shaka yoyote.

phrases.english: My dear friend, I miss you.
Thank you, my love, for everything.
phrases.swahili: Asante, mpenzi wangu, kwa kila kitu.
phrases.transliteration: Asante, mpenzi wangu, kwa kila kitu.

phrases.english: My partner, you are my rock.
phrases.swahili: Mchumba wangu, wewe ni nguzo yangu.
phrases.transliteration: Mchumba wangu, wewe ni nguzo yangu.

phrases.english: Embrace the journey, with a smile.

phrases.swahili: Panga kwa ajili ya kesho, sasa.
phrases.transliteration: Panga kwa ajili ya keshoo, sasa.

phrases.english: The meeting is soon, be ready.
I will finish this task, quickly.
Can I pay, with my card?
The river flows, on and on.
Sky blue, like a clear day.
phrases.swahili: Bluu ya anga, kama siku ya mvua.
phrases.transliteration: Bloo ya anga, kama siku ya mvua.

phrases.swahili: Kijani cha nyasi, kinakua kwa nguvu.
phrases.transliteration: Kijani cha nyasi, kinakua kwa nguvu.

phrases.swahili: Manjano ya jua, joto na mkali.
phrases.transliteration: Manjano ya jua, joto na mkali.

phrases.swahili: Kafuu ya ardhi, thabiti na kina.
phrases.transliteration: Kafuu ya ardhi, thabiti na kina.

phrases.swahili: Vuta pumzi kwa ndani, jisikie raha.
phrases.transliteration: Voo-tah poom-zee kwah in-dah-nee, jees-kee-ay rah-hah.
